name: Elfnotes: Rhapsodia of Madness
name_jp: エルフェンノーツ～<ruby lang="jp"><rb>狂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>奏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のラプソディア～
desc: While you control a monster in your center Main Monster Zone, your opponent's monsters cannot attack, except to attack that monster. You can send 1 monster from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 "Elfnote" monster in your GY with a different original Attribute; Special Summon it, then if you control a Synchro Monster, you can negate the effects of 1 face-up card your opponent controls until the end of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Elfnotes: Rhapsodia of Madness" once per turn.
eff: While you control a monster in your center Main Monster Zone, your opponent's monsters cannot attack, except to attack that monster. You can send 1 monster from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 "Elfnote" monster in your GY with a different original Attribute; Special Summon it, then if you control a Synchro Monster, you can negate the effects of 1 face-up card your opponent controls until the end of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Elfnotes: Rhapsodia of Madness" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
